commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 1 Chronicles 29:30 With all his reign and his might, and the events that happened to him, and to Israel, and to all the kingdoms of the countries. Under him in various tribulations, towards the end of his reign. (Vatable) Those prophets recorded not only what regarded David, (Haydock) but also what happened of consequence, in other nations, with which he had any connections. Syriac and Arabic, "of his land, or among the kings of his race. "(Calmet) David reduced under his dominion not only the nations which dwelt in Chanaan, but all those which had been promised to Israel.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
